name: apex-framework
description: APEX (Agent-Powered EXcellence) — Claude Code framework + APEX Ops monorepo

scripts.migrate: cd packages/database && npx prisma format && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:deploy: cd packages/database && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: cd packages/database && npx prisma format && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push
